mechanism: Humans get only permissions for their job function via custom roles scoped to function, not resource. Roles are extended with new actions when capabilities require it.
why: Resource-specific roles multiply with every new resource type — role count grows unbounded and auditing becomes impractical. Function-scoped roles absorb new actions into existing definitions without proliferation.

related.note: Custom roles assigned to Entra ID groups — role defines permission, group is the assignment unit.
New resource type triggers review of whether roles need new actions.

violations: Resource-specific role at management group level.
